steps.title: Compare the two sculptures
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between Uros House and Ocupante. The notes show two shared facts: both are sculptures by Luciana Mendez, and both use LED light.

steps.title: Reject contrasts and one-work details
steps.content: Choice A compares their sizes, emphasizing a difference. Choice C contrasts smooth domes with tangled tubes. Choice D describes only Uros House, so it does not establish a similarity with Ocupante. The answer is B.
